steps.title: Set up the percent equation
steps.content:
Let $t$ be the total number of items. Since $75\%$ of the items are faulty and there are $96$ faulty items,
$$0.75t=96$$

steps.title: Solve for the total
steps.content:
Divide both sides by $0.75$:
$$t=\frac{96}{0.75}=128$$
The answer is 128.
